productDisplayName: Puma Women Roque Navy Blue Sandals
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Roque floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with shorts or denims, and t-shirts for a casual ensemble. Upper Synthetic uppers with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle attached by a diagonal strap across the midfoot Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug Fit Logo name on the ankle strap, cat logo on the midfoot diagonal strap and brand name on the pull tab Lightly cushioned lining for better comfort Cushioned foam footbed with pattern for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for superior grip Sandal care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
